modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to make external calls on VoIP phones

full_description_text:  
User can't call outside numbers.  
Only able to call within the system.  
This is happening on Cisco VoIP phones.  
They were trying to make a call but it didn't work.
